tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: The core tests (test_prefix_day_ticks, test_prefix_week_and_month_ticks, test_no_prefix_returns_plain_numbers) actually transpile and execute the TypeScript code via Node.js, calling createXAxisTickCallback and checking return values. test_linegraph_stickiness_wiring uses AST parsing (not plain text grep). test_dayjs_import_convention uses regex but it's checking import patterns. test_not_tautological.reason: A stub implementation of createXAxisTickCallback that always returns String(value) would fail test_prefix_day_ticks (expects 'Day 1' not '1'). A stub returning empty string would also fail. The fail-to-pass tests require actual implementation of the prefix logic.
